title: NIT Calicut Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the NIT Calicut Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you ...
